name: Grade 3 Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 3 pathway for migration, environment, culture, maps, and evidence-based explanations. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 3 knowledge and transferable skills in migration, environment, culture, maps, and evidence-based explanations.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about migration, environment, culture, maps, and evidence-based explanations and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
